message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Worker-4: T4 Task CRUD impl">
You are worker-4, member of team dev-taskflow-m1m2m3m6.
Superior: Team Lead (TL).
Allowed contacts: TL only.
Do NOT SendMessage anyone else. No peer communication.

YOUR TASK:
T4: M2 - Task Service + Controller

Implement Task CRUD service and REST controller with full pagination, search, and filter support.

Acceptance criteria (M2-AC1 through AC16):
- POST /api/tasks (201): create task, auto-set createdBy from JWT userId, default priority MEDIUM
- GET /api/tasks/{id} (200): return task, 404 if not found or soft-deleted
- PUT /api/tasks/{id} (200): update task, set updatedAt, 404 if not found
- DELETE /api/tasks/{id} (204): soft delete, no response body
- GET /api/tasks (200): paginated list, default page=0 size=20 sort=createdAt,desc. Supports keyword, priority, status filters
- Soft-deleted tasks excluded from list AND return 404 on direct access
- 401 for missing token, 400 for validation errors
- Error format: {"message": "..."}

File Scope:
- ALLOWED: backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/service/TaskService.java, backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java
- READONLY: backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java, backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/repository/TaskRepository.java, backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TaskRequest.java, backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TaskResponse.java, backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TaskPageResponse.java, backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtTokenProvider.java, backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java, backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/AuthController.java, backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/service/AuthService.java
- Everything else: FORBIDDEN

REQUIRED READING (do this FIRST):
1. PLAN: C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\docs\dev-team\2026-03-06-180000\2026-03-06-PLAN.md
2. CONTRACT: C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\docs\dev-team\2026-03-06-180000\2026-03-06-CONTRACT.md
3. Test files: backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/service/TaskServiceTest.java, backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskControllerIntegrationTest.java
4. Implementation notes: C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\docs\dev-team\2026-03-06-180000\temp\impl-notes-4.md
5. ALL READONLY files (especially Task.java, TaskRepository.java, DTOs, AuthController.java for patterns)

KEY IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Extract userId from SecurityContext: `((Long) SecurityContextHolder.getContext().getAuthentication().getPrincipal())`
  (JwtAuthenticationFilter sets principal as Long userId)
- TaskService converts between Task entity and TaskResponse DTO
- TaskService.listTasks calls TaskRepository.findByFilters(keyword, priority, status, pageable)
- TaskService sets updatedAt on update, sets deleted=true on delete
- TaskController: use @Valid for request body validation
- Follow AuthController.java patterns for error handling

PARALLEL AWARENESS:
Worker-7 is working on frontend Vue components in parallel.
ONLY run YOUR test files:
- cd C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend
- ./mvnw test -Dtest="TaskServiceTest,TaskControllerIntegrationTest" -pl . 2>&1 | tail -80
Do NOT run the full test suite.

LOG WRITING:
Write to C:\Users\a0304\IdeaProjects\TouchFish-DevTeam\taskflow\docs\dev-team\2026-03-06-180000\logs\worker-4.log.md (append-only)

COMPLETION SEQUENCE:
1. Verify all 53 tests pass
1.5. Run `git diff --name-only` → compare against ALLOWED list. Revert out-of-scope.
2. Write final log entries
3. SendMessage TL: task ID, status, tests passed/failed, changed files list
4. Wait for TL response, then approve shutdown when requested
</teammate-message>

1→[SECTION] Project Overview
     2→[GOAL] Implement M1 (JWT Auth) + M2 (Task CRUD) + M3 (Task State Machine) + M6 (Task List Page) for TaskFlow
     3→[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + H2 in-memory | Vue 3 + Pinia + axios | JJWT 0.12.5 | Java 17 | Vite 5 + Vitest
     4→[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, kebab-case endpoints | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/state | Package: com.taskflow.{entity,repository,service,controller,dto,security,config}
     5→[CONSTRAINTS] ≤5 ALLOWED files per task | Soft delete (no hard delete) | JWT 24h expiry | H2 in-memory (create-drop) | No Lombok (not in pom.xml)
     6→[SHARED] backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java | frontend/src/stores/taskStore.ts
     7→
     8→[SECTION] Cross-Cutting Concerns
     9→[CROSS-CUTTING] error-format=JSON {message:string} + HTTP status | jwt-filter=OncePerRequestFilter before UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter | soft-delete=boolean deleted field, repo queries filter deleted=false | validation=Jakarta @Valid annotations, MethodArgumentNotValidException → 400 | axios-interceptor=auto-attach Bearer token from localStorage
    10→
    11→[SECTION] Standards
    12→[SOURCE] none
    13→[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code | SecurityConfig exists with permitAll /api/auth/**, STATELESS sessions, CSRF disabled
    14→
    15→[SECTION] Specs
    16→[SPEC] id=M1 | name=Authentication (JWT) | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
    17→[SPEC] id=M2 | name=Task CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
    18→[SPEC] id=M3 | name=Task State Machine | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md
    19→[SPEC] id=M6 | name=Task List Page (Vue) | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md
    20→
    21→[SECTION] Task Dependency Graph
    22→[DEP] T1 → T2, T3 (parallel) → T4 → T5
    23→[DEP] T6 → T7 (independent of backend chain)
    24→[WAVE] 1=T1,T6 | 2=T2,T3,T7 | 3=T4 | 4=T5
    25→

file.content:
[SECTION] Project Overview
[GOAL] Implement M1 (JWT Auth) + M2 (Task CRUD) + M3 (Task State Machine) + M6 (Task List Page) for TaskFlow
[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + H2 in-memory | Vue 3 + Pinia + axios | JJWT 0.12.5 | Java 17 | Vite 5 + Vitest
[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, kebab-case endpoints | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/state | Package: com.taskflow.{entity,repository,service,controller,dto,security,config}
[CONSTRAINTS] ≤5 ALLOWED files per task | Soft delete (no hard delete) | JWT 24h expiry | H2 in-memory (create-drop) | No Lombok (not in pom.xml)
[SHARED] backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/User.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java | frontend/src/stores/taskStore.ts

[SECTION] Cross-Cutting Concerns
[CROSS-CUTTING] error-format=JSON {message:string} + HTTP status | jwt-filter=OncePerRequestFilter before UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter | soft-delete=boolean deleted field, repo queries filter deleted=false | validation=Jakarta @Valid annotations, MethodArgumentNotValidException → 400 | axios-interceptor=auto-attach Bearer token from localStorage

[SECTION] Standards
[SOURCE] none
[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code | SecurityConfig exists with permitAll /api/auth/**, STATELESS sessions, CSRF disabled

[SECTION] Specs
[SPEC] id=M1 | name=Authentication (JWT) | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
[SPEC] id=M2 | name=Task CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
[SPEC] id=M3 | name=Task State Machine | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md
[SPEC] id=M6 | name=Task List Page (Vue) | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md

[SECTION] Task Dependency Graph
[DEP] T1 → T2, T3 (parallel) → T4 → T5
[DEP] T6 → T7 (independent of backend chain)
[WAVE] 1=T1,T6 | 2=T2,T3,T7 | 3=T4 | 4=T5

1→[SECTION] API Contract
     2→[VERSION] 1
     3→
     4→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,regex:^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
     5→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:number(86400)} | errors=401
     6→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
     7→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)}(Bearer) | res=201:TaskResponse | errors=400,401
     8→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=401,404
     9→[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
    10→[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=204:none | errors=401,404
    11→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=?page:int(0)&size:int(20)&sort:string(createdAt,desc)&keyword:string?&priority:enum?&status:enum?(Bearer) | res=200:TaskPageResponse | errors=401
    12→[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
    13→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TransitionResponse | errors=401,404
    14→
    15→[SECTION] Shared Types
    16→[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string?,priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW),status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED),createdBy:long,createdAt:ISO8601,updatedAt:ISO8601?
    17→[TYPE] name=TaskPageResponse | fields=content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
    18→[TYPE] name=TransitionResponse | fields=currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]
    19→
    20→[SECTION] Error Format
    21→[FORMAT] message:string — HTTP status code in response header, message in JSON body
    22→
    23→[SECTION] State Machine Rules
    24→[RULE] TODO → [IN_PROGRESS]
    25→[RULE] IN_PROGRESS → [TODO, DONE]
    26→[RULE] DONE → [CLOSED]
    27→[RULE] CLOSED → [] (terminal)
    28→
    29→[SECTION] Amendment Log
    30→

[SECTION] API Contract
[VERSION] 1

[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,regex:^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:number(86400)} | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)}(Bearer) | res=201:TaskResponse | errors=400,401
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string?(max5000),priority:enum?(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none(Bearer) | res=204:none | errors=401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=?page:int(0)&size:int(20)&sort:string(createdAt,desc)&keyword:string?&priority:enum?&status:enum?(Bearer) | res=200:TaskPageResponse | errors=401
[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)}(Bearer) | res=200:TaskResponse | errors=400,401,404
[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none(Bearer) | res=200:TransitionResponse | errors=401,404

[SECTION] Shared Types
[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string?,priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW),status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED),createdBy:long,createdAt:ISO8601,updatedAt:ISO8601?
[TYPE] name=TaskPageResponse | fields=content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
[TYPE] name=TransitionResponse | fields=currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]

[SECTION] Error Format
[FORMAT] message:string — HTTP status code in response header, message in JSON body

[SECTION] State Machine Rules
[RULE] TODO → [IN_PROGRESS]
[RULE] IN_PROGRESS → [TODO, DONE]
[RULE] DONE → [CLOSED]
[RULE] CLOSED → [] (terminal)

[SECTION] Amendment Log

content.content:
1→# Implementation Notes for T4: Task Service + Controller
     2→
     3→## TaskService expected signatures
     4→```java
     5→@Service
     6→public class TaskService {
     7→    // inject TaskRepository
     8→    TaskResponse createTask(Long userId, TaskRequest request);
     9→    TaskResponse getTask(Long id);
    10→    TaskResponse updateTask(Long id, TaskRequest request);
    11→    void deleteTask(Long id);
    12→    TaskPageResponse listTasks(String keyword, Task.Priority priority, Task.TaskStatus status, Pageable pageable);
    13→}
    14→```
    15→
    16→## Key implementation details
    17→
    18→### createTask
    19→- Set `createdBy` from the `userId` parameter (extracted from SecurityContext in controller)
    20→- If `request.getPriority()` is null, the Task entity defaults to MEDIUM (no explicit handling needed IF the entity default works; BUT if the request priority is set, copy it)
    21→- Status is always TODO for new tasks
    22→- Save and return mapped TaskResponse
    23→
    24→### getTask
    25→- Use `taskRepository.findByIdAndDeletedFalse(id)`
    26→- Throw exception (mapped to 404) if empty
    27→
    28→### updateTask
    29→- Find with `findByIdAndDeletedFalse`, throw 404 if not found
    30→- Update title, description, priority from request
    31→- Set `updatedAt = LocalDateTime.now()`
    32→- Do NOT change status or createdBy
    33→- Save and return
    34→
    35→### deleteTask
    36→- Find with `findByIdAndDeletedFalse`, throw 404 if not found
    37→- Set `deleted = true`, save
    38→- Controller returns 204 (no body)
    39→
    40→### listTasks
    41→- Delegate to `taskRepository.findByFilters(keyword, priority, status, pageable)`
    42→- Map Page<Task> to TaskPageResponse (content, page, size, totalElements, totalPages)
    43→
    44→## TaskController expected structure
    45→```java
    46→@RestController
    47→@RequestMapping("/api/tasks")
    48→public class TaskController {
    49→    // inject TaskService
    50→
    51→    @PostMapping -> 201, extract userId from SecurityContext, @Valid @RequestBody TaskRequest
    52→    @GetMapping("/{id}") -> 200
    53→    @PutMapping("/{id}") -> 200, @Valid @RequestBody TaskRequest
    54→    @DeleteMapping("/{id}") -> 204
    55→    @GetMapping -> 200, @RequestParam(required=false) keyword/priority/status, @PageableDefault(size=20, sort="createdAt", direction=DESC)
    56→}
    57→```
    58→
    59→## Extracting userId from SecurityContext
    60→```java
    61→Authentication auth = SecurityContextHolder.getContext().getAuthentication();
    62→Long userId = (Long) auth.getPrincipal();
    63→```
    64→The JwtAuthenticationFilter sets `UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken(userId, null, emptyList())` where principal is `Long userId`.
    65→
    66→## Exception handling pattern
    67→Follow AuthController pattern:
    68→- Custom exception class (e.g., TaskNotFoundException) extending RuntimeException
    69→- @ExceptionHandler in controller mapping to 404
    70→- @ExceptionHandler for MethodArgumentNotValidException mapping to 400 with `{"message": "..."}`
    71→
    72→## Task -> TaskResponse mapping
    73→Map all fields: id, title, description, priority, status, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt. This should be a private helper method `toResponse(Task)`.
    74→
    75→## Framework pitfalls
    76→- @Valid is REQUIRED on @RequestBody for validation to trigger
    77→- @PageableDefault needs explicit sort direction (Sort.Direction.DESC)
    78→- SecurityContext principal is Long (not String) - cast accordingly
    79→- Error format must be `{"message": "..."}` consistently
    80→- 204 No Content should return `ResponseEntity.noContent().build()` with no body
    81→- Soft delete: never call `repository.delete()`, always set `deleted = true` and save
    82→

input.content:
# Worker-4 Log: T4 - Task Service + Controller

## Status: COMPLETE

## Files Created
- `backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/service/TaskService.java` (NEW)
- `backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskController.java` (NEW)

## Implementation Summary

### TaskService
- `createTask(Long userId, TaskRequest)` - creates task, sets createdBy from userId, respects explicit priority or defaults to MEDIUM via entity default
- `getTask(Long id)` - finds by `findByIdAndDeletedFalse`, throws TaskNotFoundException (404) if not found
- `updateTask(Long id, TaskRequest)` - updates title/description/priority, sets updatedAt, does NOT change status or createdBy
- `deleteTask(Long id)` - soft delete (sets deleted=true), throws 404 if not found
- `listTasks(keyword, priority, status, pageable)` - delegates to `findByFilters`, maps Page<Task> to TaskPageResponse
- `toResponse(Task)` - private helper mapping all entity fields to TaskResponse
- `TaskNotFoundException` - static inner exception class extending RuntimeException

### TaskController
- `POST /api/tasks` -> 201, extracts userId from SecurityContext principal (Long cast)
- `GET /api/tasks/{id}` -> 200
- `PUT /api/tasks/{id}` -> 200, @Valid @RequestBody
- `DELETE /api/tasks/{id}` -> 204 no content
- `GET /api/tasks` -> 200, @PageableDefault(size=20, sort="createdAt", direction=DESC), optional keyword/priority/status params
- `@ExceptionHandler` for TaskNotFoundException -> 404 `{"message": "..."}`
- `@ExceptionHandler` for MethodArgumentNotValidException -> 400 `{"message": "..."}`

## Test Results
- **56 tests run, 0 failures, 0 errors, 0 skipped**
- TaskServiceTest: 24 passed (CreateTask: 6, GetTask: 4, UpdateTask: 4, DeleteTask: 3, ListTasks: 7)
- TaskControllerIntegrationTest: 32 passed (CreateTask: 8, GetTask: 3, UpdateTask: 3, DeleteTask: 3, ListTasks: 9, AuthRequired: 6)

## Scope Verification
- `git diff --name-only` checked; no out-of-scope files modified by this worker
- Only 2 new files created, both in ALLOWED list
